prompt: Range bucket is medium and the price is fair. Choose action.
why_v1: Call keeps a medium bucket under control when the price is fair and stronger hands still exist.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Call fits this medium bucket because it keeps the pot controlled without turning a fair continue into forced pressure.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call fits this medium bucket because the fair price supports control, not a forced raise into stronger hands.
